items.briefing:
Australian small businesses are being urged to stay alert to scams, with Scamwatch highlighting the ongoing risk of fraud targeting business owners. Separately, a surge in Chinese-linked phishing activity has been flagged, along with a newly identified vulnerability — both relevant reminders that email-based threats remain a key risk for Australian organisations of all sizes.

A hacking group has also reportedly stolen internal repositories from GitHub, which could expose software tools many Australian businesses rely on. If your organisation uses GitHub or similar platforms, it's worth checking for any unusual activity on connected accounts.

**Tip:** Enable multi-factor authentication on any developer or code-sharing platforms your team uses.

featured.title: Kinetic IT report flags AI & sovereign execution gap
featured.quote: Australian government agencies lack funding and skills to safely deploy AI systems.
